# seerr_api_key (Resource)

Manage the Seerr API key. Creating this resource will regenerate the API key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "seerr_api_key" "current" {}

output "seerr_api_key" {
  value     = seerr_api_key.current.api_key
  sensitive = true
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The current Seerr API key.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
